heading: Career skills training
label: 18802 Career skills training
notes: Wage Rate RequirementsFor provisions relating to rates of wages to be paid to laborers and mechanics on projects for construction, alteration, or repair work funded under div. D or an amendment by div. D of , including authority of Secretary of Labor, see .Pub. L. 117–58section 18851 of this title
amendments: Wage Rate RequirementsFor provisions relating to rates of wages to be paid to laborers and mechanics on projects for construction, alteration, or repair work funded under div. D or an amendment by div. D of , including authority of Secretary of Labor, see .Pub. L. 117–58section 18851 of this title

children.text: includes the equal participation of industry, including public or private employers, and labor organizations, including joint labor-management training programs;

may include workforce investment boards, community-based organizations, qualified service and conservation corps, educational institutions, small businesses, cooperatives, State and local veterans agencies, and veterans service organizations; and

children.label: A
children.text: experience in implementing and operating worker skills training and education programs;

children.label: B
children.text: the ability to identify and involve in training programs carried out under this section, target populations of individuals who would benefit from training and be actively involved in activities relating to energy efficiency and renewable energy industries; and

children.label: C
children.text: the ability to help individuals achieve economic self-sufficiency.

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: b Establishment
children.text: The Secretary shall award grants to eligible entities to pay the Federal share of associated career skills training programs under which students concurrently receive classroom instruction and on-the-job training for the purpose of obtaining an industry-related certification to install energy efficient buildings technologies.

children.heading: Federal share
children.label: c Federal share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of carrying out a career skills training program described in subsection (b) shall be 50 percent.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out this section $10,000,000 for fiscal year 2022, to remain available until expended.
